memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::local_player_instance) (struct media_player *player, int err)
memberdef.name: local_player_instance

detaileddescription.para: Called when the local Media Player instance is registered or read (TODO). Also called if the local player instance is already registered when the controller is registered. Provides the controller with the pointer to the local player instance.

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, or errno on negative value.

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::player_name_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, const char *name)
memberdef.name: player_name_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Media Player Name is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_name_get()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The name of the media player

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::icon_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: icon_id_recv

briefdescription.para: Media Player Icon Object ID receive callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Media Player Icon Object ID is read See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_icon_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID of the Icon object in the Object Transfer Service (48 bits)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::icon_url_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, const char *url)
memberdef.name: icon_url_recv

briefdescription.para: Media Player Icon URL receive callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Media Player Icon URL is read See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_icon_url()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The URL of the icon

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::track_changed_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err)
memberdef.name: track_changed_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Current Track is changed

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::track_title_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, const char *title)
memberdef.name: track_title_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Track Title is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_track_title()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The title of the current track

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::track_duration_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, int32_t duration)
memberdef.name: track_duration_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Track Duration is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_track_duration()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The duration of the current track

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::track_position_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, int32_t position)
memberdef.name: track_position_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Track Position is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_track_position() and media_proxy_ctrl_set_track_position()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The player's position in the track

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::track_position_write) (struct media_player *player, int err, int32_t position)
memberdef.name: track_position_write

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Track Position is written See also media_proxy_ctrl_set_track_position().

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The position given attempted to write

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::playback_speed_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, int8_t speed)
memberdef.name: playback_speed_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Playback Speed is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_playback_speed() and media_proxy_ctrl_set_playback_speed()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The playback speed parameter

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::playback_speed_write) (struct media_player *player, int err, int8_t speed)
memberdef.name: playback_speed_write

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Playback Speed is written See also media_proxy_ctrl_set_playback_speed()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The playback speed parameter attempted to write

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::seeking_speed_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, int8_t speed)
memberdef.name: seeking_speed_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Seeking Speed is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_seeking_speed()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The seeking speed factor

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::track_segments_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: track_segments_id_recv

briefdescription.para: Track Segments Object ID receive callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Track Segments Object ID is read See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_track_segments_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID of the track segments object in Object Transfer Service (48 bits)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::current_track_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: current_track_id_recv

briefdescription.para: Current Track Object ID receive callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Current Track Object ID is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_current_track_id() and media_proxy_ctrl_set_current_track_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID of the current track object in Object Transfer Service (48 bits)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::current_track_id_write) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: current_track_id_write

briefdescription.para: Current Track Object ID write callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Current Track Object ID is written See also media_proxy_ctrl_set_current_track_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID (48 bits) attempted to write

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::next_track_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: next_track_id_recv

briefdescription.para: Next Track Object ID receive callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Next Track Object ID is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_next_track_id() and media_proxy_ctrl_set_next_track_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID of the next track object in Object Transfer Service (48 bits)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::next_track_id_write) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: next_track_id_write

briefdescription.para: Next Track Object ID write callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Next Track Object ID is written See also media_proxy_ctrl_set_next_track_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID (48 bits) attempted to write

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::parent_group_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: parent_group_id_recv

briefdescription.para: Parent Group Object ID receive callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Parent Group Object ID is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_parent_group_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID of the parent group object in Object Transfer Service (48 bits)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::current_group_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: current_group_id_recv

briefdescription.para: Current Group Object ID receive callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Current Group Object ID is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_current_group_id() and media_proxy_ctrl_set_current_group_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID of the current group object in Object Transfer Service (48 bits)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::current_group_id_write) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: current_group_id_write

briefdescription.para: Current Group Object ID write callback.

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Current Group Object ID is written See also media_proxy_ctrl_set_current_group_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID (48 bits) attempted to write

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::playing_order_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint8_t order)
memberdef.name: playing_order_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Playing Order is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_playing_order() and media_proxy_ctrl_set_playing_order()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The playing order

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::playing_order_write) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint8_t order)
memberdef.name: playing_order_write

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Playing Order is written See also media_proxy_ctrl_set_playing_order()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The playing order attempted to write

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::playing_orders_supported_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint16_t orders)
memberdef.name: playing_orders_supported_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Playing Orders Supported is read See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_playing_orders_supported()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The playing orders supported

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::media_state_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint8_t state)
memberdef.name: media_state_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Media State is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_media_state() and media_proxy_ctrl_send_command()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The media player state

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::command_send) (struct media_player *player, int err, const struct mpl_cmd *cmd)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct media_player *player, int err, const struct mpl_cmd *cmd)
memberdef.name: command_send

detaileddescription.para: Called when a command has been sent See also media_proxy_ctrl_send_command()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The command sent

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::command_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, const struct mpl_cmd_ntf *result)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct media_player *player, int err, const struct mpl_cmd_ntf *result)
memberdef.name: command_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when a command result has been received See also media_proxy_ctrl_send_command()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The result received

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::commands_supported_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint32_t opcodes)
memberdef.name: commands_supported_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Commands Supported is read or changed See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_commands_supported()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The supported command opcodes (bitmap)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::search_send) (struct media_player *player, int err, const struct mpl_search *search)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct media_player *player, int err, const struct mpl_search *search)
memberdef.name: search_send

detaileddescription.para: Called when a search has been sent See also media_proxy_ctrl_send_search()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The search sent

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::search_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint8_t result_code)
memberdef.name: search_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when a search result code has been received See also media_proxy_ctrl_send_search()

The search result code tells whether the search was successful or not. For a successful search, the actual results of the search (i.e. what was found as a result of the search)can be accessed using the Search Results Object ID. The Search Results Object ID has a separate callback - search_results_id_recv().

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
Search result code

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::search_results_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: search_results_id_recv

briefdescription.para: Search Results Object ID receive callback See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_search_results_id()

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Search Results Object ID is read or changed

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The ID of the search results object in Object Transfer Service (48 bits)

memberdef.definition: void(* media_proxy_ctrl_cbs::content_ctrl_id_recv) (struct media_player *player, int err, uint8_t ccid)
memberdef.name: content_ctrl_id_recv

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Content Control ID is read See also media_proxy_ctrl_get_content_ctrl_id()

parameterdescription.para: Media player instance pointer
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error on positive value or errno on negative value.
The content control ID

briefdescription.para: Callbacks to a controller, from the media proxy.

detaileddescription.para: Given by a controller when registering
